summary: Iteration 45: Code quality/validity fix verification complete. All 5 fixes verified: 1) App.js skeleton components (PageSkel, LightSkel) have valid JSX with data-testid attributes, 2) index.html cleaned - no debug-monitor.js, cdn.tailwindcss, or iframe code, 3) Lazy-loading works correctly - Header/Hero sync, all other sections lazy, 4) AdminPanel/BlogPage/B2BPage all lazy-loaded, 5) PostHog deferred via requestIdleCallback. All routes working, no JS errors (except non-blocking emergent-main.js DataCloneError).

issues: DataCloneError in emergent-main.js when fetching settings (non-blocking, external script - not app code)

critical_code_review_comments: App.js: PageSkel and LightSkel have proper JSX bodies with data-testid='page-skeleton-dark' and 'page-skeleton-light'
index.html: Verified no debug-monitor.js, cdn.tailwindcss.com, or iframe code present
index.html: PostHog correctly deferred via requestIdleCallback with setTimeout fallback
MainLanding.jsx: BelowFold has 1500px skeleton fallback with data-testid='below-fold-skeleton'
SaunaHomePage.jsx: Header/Hero/Footer sync, all sections lazy-loaded with Skel fallback
Hero.jsx: No framer-motion imports, uses pure CSS for animations
CookieConsentBanner.jsx: Uses CSS transitions (transition-all duration-400), no framer-motion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality fixes verified. Key validations: 1) Skeleton components have valid JSX with data-testid, 2) index.html cleaned of debug/CDN/iframe code, 3) PostHog deferred via requestIdleCallback, 4) All pages lazy-loaded correctly, 5) No framer-motion in Hero/CookieConsentBanner. All routes working: /, /sauny, /balie, /blog, /b2b, /admin.

main_landing_loads.details: Main landing page loads with header, 2 product cards (Cloudinary images), navigation, language switcher

skeleton_placeholders.details: PageSkel (data-testid='page-skeleton-dark') and LightSkel (data-testid='page-skeleton-light') have valid JSX with fixed height

sauny_page_hero.details: /sauny page loads with Hero section using Cloudinary background, title, subtitle, CTA buttons

sauny_lazy_sections.details: Models, Calculator, Contact sections lazy-load on scroll

balie_page.details: /balie page loads correctly with hero and navigation

cookie_banner.details: Cookie consent banner appears after ~3.5s delay with CSS transition (no framer-motion)

floating_contact.details: WhatsApp and phone floating buttons visible

below_fold_sections.details: About, Contact, Map, Footer load on scroll in MainLanding

no_js_errors.details: No JavaScript errors in app code (only non-blocking DataCloneError from external emergent-main.js)

index_html_cleanup.details: No debug-monitor.js, cdn.tailwindcss.com, or iframe code in index.html

posthog_deferred.details: PostHog loaded via requestIdleCallback with setTimeout(3000) fallback
